title: verbascum × comosum
intro: Verbascum × comosum, also known as the mullein or mulein, is a hybrid plant species of the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × comosum include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and even aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
